alebcay/awesome-shell

Development Environment  6 months ago  25.1k
A curated list of awesome command-line frameworks, toolkits, guides and gizmos. Inspired by awesome-php.
View byDAY/WEEK/README
View on Github

Apr 25th - May 1st, 2022

System Utilities

  • lsdstars8.5k - LSDeluxe, rewrite of GNU ls with lot of added features like colors, icons, tree-view and more formatting options.
  • btopstars9.1k - Linux/OSX/FreeBSD resource monitor

    • Feb 21st - Feb 27th, 2022

    Customization

  • oh-my-posh - Prompt theme engine for any shell and platform written in go.

    • System Utilities

  • tiptopstars1.2k - Graphical command-line system monitor.

    • Command-Line Productivity

  • bartibstars309 - A simple timetracker for the command line. It saves a log of all tracked activities as a plaintext file and allows you to create flexible reports.
  • lowchartsstars107 - Draw low-resolution graphs in terminal

    • Shell Script Development

  • composurestars302 - Compose, document, version and organize your shell functions
  • dispatch - A command line argument parser in 50 lines of portable shell script.
  • getopts.fishstars196 - CLI parser for fish
  • bashly - Bash command line framework and CLI generator
  • bash-modulesstars94 - functions for developing with unofficial strict mode enabled.

    • Aug 30th - Sep 5th, 2021

    Applications

  • tickerstars4.4k — Terminal stock ticker with live updates and position tracking

    • For Developers

  • gitastars1.2k - A command-line tool to manage multiple git repos.

    • Downloading and Serving

  • xhstars3.2k - Friendly and fast tool for sending HTTP requests

    • Jun 7th - Jun 13th, 2021

    Multimedia and File Formats

  • yqstars6.6k - yq is a portable command-line YAML processor

    • Shell Script Development

  • shfmtstars5.1k - A shell parser, formatter, and interpreter with bash support; includes shfmt
  • getoptionsstars236 - An elegant option parser for shell scripts (sh, bash and all POSIX shells)
  • bashewstars152 - bash script creator - from small stand-alone script to complex projects with CI/CD and testing

    • Customization

  • starship - Fast, customisable, cross-shell prompt written in rust

    • Command-Line Productivity

  • pass - Manage passwords from the command line with GPG encryption and optional git integration.

    • Shells

  • powershell a cross-platform task automation and configuration management framework, consisting of a command-line shell and scripting language
  • ngsstars1.2k - Fully featured scripting language created specifically for Ops. REPL is being developed.

    • System Utilities

  • prettypingstars1.1k - Making the output of ping prettier, more colorful, more compact, and easier to read.

    • Guides

  • Shell Field Guide

    • For Developers

  • juststars7.3k - Task runner for saving and running project-specific commands.

    • Applications

  • pcalcstars169 - Calculator made for programmers working with multiple number representations, sizes, and overall close to the bits.

    • Mar 29th - Apr 4th, 2021

    Multimedia and File Formats

  • daselstars3.7k - Query and update data structures using selectors from the command line. Comparable to jqstars23.3k / yqstars2k but supports JSON, YAML, TOML and XML with zero runtime dependencies.

    • Applications

  • editlystars3.6k - Command line video editor

    • Oct 26th - Nov 1st, 2020

    Applications

  • dstaskstars654 - Single binary terminal-based TODO manager with git-based sync + markdown notes per task

    • Shells

  • es - The extensible shell, based on Plan 9's rcstars195 shell

    • Command-Line Productivity

    Directory Navigation

  • zpyistars97 - Python in Zsh - Easy python scripting in shell

    • Shell Script Development

  • shellspecstars763 - A full-featured BDD unit testing framework for dash, bash, ksh, zsh and all POSIX shells

    • Downloading and Serving

  • youtube-dl - Small command-line program to download videos from YouTube.com and other video sites

    • Oct 5th - Oct 11th, 2020

    Customization

  • powerlevel10kstars31.7k - Super flexible awesome powerline ZSH theme

    • System Utilities

  • ccatstars3k - ccat is the colorizing cat. It works similar to cat but displays content with syntax highlighting.

    • Downloading and Serving

  • httpiestars24.1k - HTTPie is a command line HTTP client, a user-friendly cURL replacement

    • Applications

  • kanban.bashstars752 - commandline asciii kanban board for minimalist productivity bash hackers (csv-based)

    • Shell Script Development

  • powscriptstars120 - bash transpiler written in bash (coffeescript for bash)

    • Guides

  • Bash Official Reference Manual
  • The Linux Documentation Project: Bash Programming - Intro/How-to
  • The Linux Documentation Project: Advanced Bash Scripting Guide

    • Jul 27th - Aug 2nd, 2020

    Command-Line Productivity

  • spark.fishstars278 - ▁▂▃▅ Sparkline Generator

    • Command-Line Productivity

    Directory Navigation

  • zoxidestars7.9k - A faster way to navigate your filesystem, written in Rust

    • Jun 29th - Jul 5th, 2020

    Command-Line Productivity

    Directory Navigation

  • aliasmestars103 - alias helper to change directory quickly
  • autojumpstars14.3k - A cd command that learns - easily navigate directories from the command line
  • bashmarksstars1.8k - Directory bookmarks for the shell
  • bdstars883 - Quickly go back to a parent directory
  • commacdstars334 - A faster way to move around in Bash
  • enhancdstars2.2k - 🚀 A next-generation cd command with an interactive filter
  • gotostars811 - A shell utility for navigation to aliased directories supporting auto-completion
  • jumpstars1.4k - Jump helps you navigate your file system faster by learning your habits.
  • lazy-cdstars20 - Simple bash commands for bookmarked navigation of the file system, complete with bash-completion.
  • upstars143 - Ascend directories by name or count; for bash, zsh, and fish.

    • May 11th - May 17th, 2020

    Multimedia and File Formats

  • visidatastars6k - A terminal spreadsheet multitool for exploring and arranging data (csv/json/xml/xls/yaml/etc)

    • Applications

  • pockytstars471 - Read, Manage, and Automate your Pocket collection.
  • nominostars431 - Batch rename utility using regex, sort and map file options.

    • Apr 6th - Apr 12th, 2020

    System Utilities

  • mazastars1.6k - Local ad blocker. Like Pi-hole but local and using your operating system.

    • Shell Script Development

  • eshstars160 - A simple templating engine based on shell, implemented in ~290 lines of POSIX shell and awk.
  • critic.shstars449 - Dead simple testing framework for Bash with coverage reporting
  • bash-language-serverstars1.4k - LSP-based Bash language server

    • Shells

  • nushellstars21.1k - A modern shell written in Rust

    • Command-Line Productivity

  • byobu - Text-based window manager and terminal multiplexer

    • Mar 2nd - Mar 8th, 2020

    Shells

  • ionstars1.3k - A modern system shell that features a simple, yet powerful, syntax. It is written entirely in Rust.

    • Feb 24th - Mar 1st, 2020

    For Developers

  • mkdkrstars303 - Makefile + Docker = CI Pipeline

    • Downloading and Serving

  • bashhub-serverstars249 - Private cloud shell history. Open source server for bashhub

    • Command-Line Productivity

  • codstars427 — A completion daemon for shell that learns when you invoke --help commands
  • reshstars746 - Contextual shell history for Zsh and Bash
  • boomstars1.2k - Store links and snippets in the command line
  • dnotestars2.4k - A simple command line notebook with multi-device sync and web interface
  • foxystars38 - Plain text bookmarks for Firefox and surf browsers.

    • Jan 13th - Jan 19th, 2020

    Command-Line Productivity

  • eurekastars567 - 💡 CLI tool to input and store your ideas without leaving the terminal
  • gitmuxstars342 - Show Git status in Tmux status bar
  • parallel - Build and execute shell command lines from standard input in parallel

    • Customization

  • geometrystars849 - A minimal ZSH theme where any function can be added to the left prompt or (async) right prompt on the fly.
  • synth-shellstars551 - Greeter with a customizable status report and a fancy bash prompt

    • Shells

  • zsh - Powerful shell with scripting language

    • System Utilities

  • lnav - An advanced log file viewer for the small-scale

    • Shell Package Management

  • bpkg - JavaScript has npm, Ruby has Gems, Python has pip and now Shell has bpkg

    • Guides

  • Greg Wooledge's (aka "greycat") wiki. Specifically Bash Guide, Bash FAQ and Bash Pitfalls

    • Dec 2nd - Dec 8th, 2019

    Downloading and Serving

  • vesperstars193 - 🍸Vesper is a HTTP framework for Bash/Unix Shell

    • Nov 25th - Dec 1st, 2019

    Command-Line Productivity

  • funkystars608 - Extends functionality of shell functions making them more powerful and flexible.
  • navistars11.9k - An interactive cheatsheet tool for the command-line

    • Shells

  • yash - A POSIX-compliant command line shell with built-in support for completion and prediction based on command history

    • Multimedia and File Formats

  • fxstars15.3k - Command-line JSON processing tool by anononymus JavaScript functions

    • Command-Line Productivity

    Directory Navigation

  • zstars14.7k - z is the new j, yo

    • Oct 28th - Nov 3rd, 2019

    System Utilities

  • bmonstars966 - Real-time network bandwidth monitor and rate estimator with human-friendly visual output

    • Oct 21st - Oct 27th, 2019

    Command-Line Productivity

    Directory Navigation

  • z.luastars2.4k - A new cd command that helps you navigate faster by learning your habits

    • Shell Script Development

  • Bashletsstars64 - A modular extensible toolbox for Bash
  • bashfulstars567 - A collection of libraries to simplify writing Bash scripts
  • Fishtapestars310 - TAP producer and test harness for fish

    • For Developers

  • forgitstars3.5k - Utility tool for git taking advantage of fuzzy finder fzf.
  • wipe-modulesstars325 - A little agent that removes the node_modules folder of non-active projects
  • ack - A grep-like search tool optimized for source code.
  • bitwisestars467 - Terminal based interactive bit manipulator in curses.
  • overcommitstars3.7k - A fully configurable and extendable Git hook manager

    • System Utilities

  • nmtuistars254 - Text User Interface for controlling NetworkManager
  • batstars37.6k - A cat clone with wings
  • exastars19.5k - A modern version of ls.

    • Command-Line Productivity

  • mcflystars4.5k - Fly through your shell history. Great Scot!
  • browshstars15.1k - The modern text-based browser
  • autoenvstars5k - Directory-based environments
  • googlrstars35 - Command line tool that lets you search Google from your terminal.

    • Multimedia and File Formats

  • jostars4.3k - A small utility to create JSON objects from command-line arguments.

    • Shells

  • ksh93stars459 - Korn Shell
  • mkshstars171 - MirBSD Korn Shell
  • okshstars263 - Portable OpenBSD ksh
  • pdksh - Public domain Korn shell
  • tcsh - C shell with file name completion and command line editing
  • shell++stars111 - Friendly and modern functional and object oriented shell script language
  • xonsh - Python-ish, BASHwards-looking shell language and command prompt

    • Applications

  • jrnlstars5.6k - A simple command line journal application that stores your journal in a plain text file

    • Shell Package Management

  • yadm - Git-based dotfiles manager supporting encryption, alternates, and bootstrapping

    • May 13th - May 19th, 2019

    Command-Line Productivity

  • screen - GNU terminal multiplexer

    • Jan 28th - Feb 3rd, 2019

    Guides

  • Bash Hackers Wiki

    • Nov 26th - Dec 2nd, 2018

    Command-Line Productivity

  • mackupstars12.5k - Keep your application settings in sync (OS X/Linux)
  • ddgrstars2.4k - DuckDuckGo from the terminal
  • pddstars281 - Tiny date, time diff calculator with timers

    • Applications

  • taskbookstars8.6k - Tasks, boards & notes for the command-line habitat

    • Oct 22nd - Oct 28th, 2018

    Downloading and Serving

  • shell2httpstars992 - HTTP-server to execute shell commands. Designed for development, prototyping or remote control

  • fselectstars3.3k - Find files with SQL-like queries.
  • loopstars604 - Write and control complex loops with as one-liners

    Multimedia and File Formats

  • korkutstars351 - Quick and simple image processing at the command line.

    • Applications

  • md2pngstars24 - Convert markdown to PNG image
